mapper.select: SELECT code, name, description, active, source, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_signal_weight_profile WHERE code IN ('DEFAULT', 'BACKTEST_V1', 'BACKTEST_V2', 'REGIME_V1') ORDER BY CASE code WHEN 'DEFAULT' THEN 1 WHEN 'BACKTEST_V1' THEN 2 WHEN 'BACKTEST_V2' THEN 3 WHEN 'REGIME_V1' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END

SELECT profile_code AS profileCode, factor, weight, enabled, reason, sort_order AS sortOrder, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_signal_weight_profile_item WHERE profile_code = #{profileCode} ORDER BY sort_order, factor
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_signal_weight_profile ( code, name, description, active, source ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{active}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), description = VALUES(description), source = VALUES(source), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_signal_weight_profile_item ( profile_code, factor, weight, enabled, reason, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{profileCode}, #{factor}, #{weight}, #{enabled}, #{reason}, #{sortOrder} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE weight = VALUES(weight), enabled = VALUES(enabled), reason = VALUES(reason), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
